body_html:
Hi Madame,

Thanks again for reaching out about bar service for the birthday on May 19.

Since this is a bar-service-only request, I wanted to make this easy to review and give you a few real ballpark directions instead of pretending there is only one right package.

Bar-Only Ballpark Options

Working guest count: 50 guests

1. Standard Cash Bar

$6.50 per person + $150 standard bar setup

Ballpark Total: ~$475.00

good if you want professional bar service without carrying the full open-bar spend

2. Open Bar: Beer & Wine

$22.00 per person + $150 standard bar setup

Ballpark Total: ~$1250.00

good middle ground if you want it to feel hosted without going all the way to a full liquor bar

3. Beer & Wine + 3 Signature Drinks

$27.00 per person + $150 standard bar setup

Ballpark Total: ~$1500.00

good if you want a more fun cocktail feel while keeping the structure tighter than a full open bar

4. Open Bar: Full Bar

$30.00 per person + $150 standard bar setup

Ballpark Total: ~$1650.00

strong fit if you want the broadest drink selection for guests

5. Full Bar + 2 Signature Drinks

$35.00 per person + $150 standard bar setup

Ballpark Total: ~$1900.00

the most complete hosted bar direction, especially if signature drinks matter to the vibe

Add-ons from the same pricing source:

Champagne service: +$199.50 total for 50 guests

Bartender staffing block: +$100.00 fixed

Extra bar hour varies by package: cash bar +$97.50, beer & wine +$350.00, beer & wine + signature +$400.00, full bar +$400.00, full bar + signature +$450.00.

Just so I understand, which middle ground feels closer to what you have in mind right now: cash bar, beer and wine, or a fuller hosted bar experience?
This next part is if you would like to try some of our food :)

Come Taste It First

Date options: Sunday, May 3 at 5:30 PM
Sunday, May 17 at 2:00 PM
Sunday, May 31 at 2:00 PM

Location: 199 Main St, Fitchburg, MA 01420

Code: ANDRE

Tasting Preview Tasting Registration

If you want to get a feel for the broader Comeketo experience while you decide the bar direction, I can save you a spot.

Regards,

Andre Raw
Catering Event Coordinator
📲 C: (978) 235-3791
📲 W: (978) 381-1212
Facebook | Instagram | Website

body_text:
Hi Madame,

Thanks again for reaching out about bar service for the birthday on May 19.

Since this is a bar-service-only request, I wanted to make this easy to review
and give you a few real ballpark directions instead of pretending there is
only one right package.

![Comeketo bar service](https://comeketocatering.com/wp-
content/uploads/2025/06/Header_Bar_Compressed.jpg)

## Bar-Only Ballpark Options

**Working guest count:** 50 guests

**1\. Standard Cash Bar**

$6.50 per person + $150 standard bar setup

**Ballpark Total:** ~$475.00

good if you want professional bar service without carrying the full open-bar
spend

**2\. Open Bar: Beer & Wine**

$22.00 per person + $150 standard bar setup

**Ballpark Total:** ~$1250.00

good middle ground if you want it to feel hosted without going all the way to
a full liquor bar

**3\. Beer & Wine + 3 Signature Drinks**

$27.00 per person + $150 standard bar setup

**Ballpark Total:** ~$1500.00

good if you want a more fun cocktail feel while keeping the structure tighter
than a full open bar

**4\. Open Bar: Full Bar**

$30.00 per person + $150 standard bar setup

**Ballpark Total:** ~$1650.00

strong fit if you want the broadest drink selection for guests

**5\. Full Bar + 2 Signature Drinks**

$35.00 per person + $150 standard bar setup

**Ballpark Total:** ~$1900.00

the most complete hosted bar direction, especially if signature drinks matter
to the vibe

**Add-ons from the same pricing source:**

Champagne service: +$199.50 total for 50 guests

Bartender staffing block: +$100.00 fixed

Extra bar hour varies by package: cash bar +$97.50, beer & wine +$350.00, beer
& wine + signature +$400.00, full bar +$400.00, full bar + signature +$450.00.

Just so I understand, which middle ground feels closer to what you have in
mind right now: **cash bar** , **beer and wine** , or a **fuller hosted bar
experience**?  
**This next part is if you would like to try some of our food :)**

## Come Taste It First

**Date options:** Sunday, May 3 at 5:30 PM  
Sunday, May 17 at 2:00 PM  
Sunday, May 31 at 2:00 PM

**Location:** 199 Main St, Fitchburg, MA 01420

**Code:** ANDRE

[**Tasting
Preview**](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1V2glKcSbQUtDes3Cuk7Q4bFPiazU1NwT/view)
[**Tasting Registration**](https://form.jotform.com/260145767354461)

If you want to get a feel for the broader Comeketo experience while you decide
the bar direction, I can save you a spot.

* * *

Regards,

Andre Raw  
Catering Event Coordinator  
📲 C: (978) 235-3791  
📲 W: (978) 381-1212  
Facebook | Instagram | Website
